notes: Operational hub consolidating remaining human/operator tails that should not keep old implementation plans alive.
This hub is the source of truth for admin PostHog/i18n, client stacking QA, design breakpoint QA, and GitHub Copilot operator checks.
Afo owns GitHub admin/billing decisions and PostHog dashboard/funnel edits; agents own translation audits, browser QA, and API verification where credentials are available.

GitHub API verification on 2026-04-25 narrowed Copilot rollout leftovers to draft-review parity on develop, budget/alerts, Dependabot remediation routing, autonomous-agent controls, and the two-week pilot review.
.plans/ is durable repo truth; status.json history[] carries each verification probe command + snippet as evidence.
PostHog analytics read token canonical env name: POSTHOG_ANALYTICS_READ_KEY.
PostHog checker completed on 2026-04-26: no stale route references; zero expected route page_view events in last 30 days; privacy-sensitive references flagged for review.

ui.handoff_note: No UI code changes. Chrome MCP spot-checks live in qa_pass_1 instead.

state_api.handoff_note: No data-layer changes. The only repo change originating here is the native es/pt translator pass inside packages/shared/src/i18n/.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Runs after each Afo-completed manual item. Invokes the matching gh api / PostHog / locale probe in the same turn and records the command + output snippet in status.json history[].

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Starts once qa_pass_1 has green-checked every AC. Confirms no deleted-plan path remains necessary for the manual-ops evidence trail.

history.note: Hub created to consolidate manual-only tails: admin PostHog dashboards, native es/pt translation, GitHub Copilot rulesets/budget/security checks, client stacking QA, and design breakpoint QA.

GitHub API reads verified active main/develop rulesets with copilot_code_review and review_on_push, CodeQL default setup configured, vulnerability alerts enabled, secret scanning enabled with push protection, and 14 open Dependabot alerts. develop still reviews draft PRs; budget/autonomous-agent controls remain manual.

Split manual ops into Afo-only external-console checks and agent-owned checks. Added concrete PostHog event context: usePageView emits page_view with app/path, so dashboard/funnel closeout should filter by app and current route family.

Added .plans/active/manual-ops-closeout/posthog-check.mjs and attempted a controlled Varlock-backed PostHog API verification. Production profile blocked on unrelated TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/ENCRYPTION_SECRET validation; development profile loaded but no POSTHOG_API_KEY, POSTHOG_PROJECT_API_KEY, or POSTHOG_CLI_TOKEN was available. Afo clarified the token lives in 1Password as POSTHOG_CLI_TOKEN, but op whoami reports account is not signed in and item/vault reads return Forbidden. Live PostHog checklist is ready but blocked on 1Password CLI authentication or an exported read-only PostHog token.

Retry found POSTHOG_CLI_TOKEN is now present but points to the literal placeholder op://<vault>/<item>/POSTHOG_CLI_TOKEN, which Varlock rejects as an invalid secret reference. Replace the placeholder with the real 1Password field secret reference, then rerun the PostHog checker.

After Afo added POSTHOG_CLI_TOKEN to .env, the checker reached PostHog but both us.posthog.com and app.posthog.com returned 403 permission_denied: API key missing required scope project:read. Need a PostHog personal/read API token with project read plus dashboard/insight/query read permissions to complete AC-4.

PostHog checker now supports POSTHOG_ANALYTICS_READ_KEY, POSTHOG_ANALYTICS_KEY, and POSTHOG_ANALYTIC_KEY aliases. The API check authenticated against us.posthog.com, fetched admin project 262122 and client project 163591, found 10 dashboards and 104 insights, found no stale route references, but found zero page_view events for all expected admin/client route families in the last 30 days. Privacy scan flagged distinct_id/person_id/recording references in default dashboards/insights for follow-up review.

Marked Afo-only GitHub Copilot checklist complete by report, recorded PostHog checker completion with findings, and separated remaining work into route-event proof, privacy review, translation fill, and browser QA. Added posthog-results-2026-04-26.md evidence summary.
